name: cursor-remote-cursor
description: Self-hosted web relay to monitor Cursor agent chat, approve tool calls, and send prompts from your phone.

scripts.copy-web: rm -rf packages/relay/static && mkdir -p packages/relay/static && cp -r packages/web/dist/. packages/relay/static/
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/web && npm run copy-web && npm run build -w packages/relay && npm run build -w packages/extension
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/web && concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/relay" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
